meta.title: [he-IL] KiX — The Gamification Marketing Platform
meta.description: [he-IL] Win customers through play. Free gamification SaaS — pay only when we deliver a new customer.
meta.og_description: [he-IL] All gamification features are free. You only pay when a new customer arrives.
hero.title: [he-IL] Win customers through play
hero.sub: [he-IL] All gamification features are free. You only pay when we deliver a new customer.
problem.title: [he-IL] Customer acquisition is broken
problem.sub: [he-IL] Three forces are pushing CAC up and retention down.
problem.card1.title: [he-IL] Acquisition costs up 50% YoY
problem.card1.body: [he-IL] Auction-based ad markets keep raising the price of every new customer.
problem.card2.title: [he-IL] Audiences are ad-blind
problem.card2.body: [he-IL] Most users now skip past ads in a glance — banner blindness is the default.
problem.card3.title: [he-IL] Loyalty retention under 25%
problem.card3.body: [he-IL] Traditional points cards rarely earn a second visit.
solution.title: [he-IL] Four pillars, one growth engine
solution.sub: [he-IL] Gamification turns attention into acquisition — measurably.
solution.card1.title: [he-IL] Gamification
solution.card1.body: [he-IL] AI-generated mini-games, free to deploy. Zero engineering lift.
solution.card2.title: [he-IL] Smart acquisition
solution.card2.body: [he-IL] Pay only for the new customers we deliver. Wasted impressions cost nothing.
solution.card3.title: [he-IL] Cross-brand network
solution.card3.body: [he-IL] Our matching engine routes the right user to the right brand across the network.
solution.card4.title: [he-IL] Real-time analytics
solution.card4.body: [he-IL] Track CAC, ROAS and cohort retention live — every cent is attributable.
how.title: [he-IL] Three steps to your first delivered customer
how.sub: [he-IL] From registration to ROI in days, not quarters.
how.step1.title: [he-IL] Register your brand
how.step1.body: [he-IL] Create an account and get the full SaaS workspace — games, SDK and analytics — instantly and free.
how.step2.title: [he-IL] Activate the auction
how.step2.body: [he-IL] Set a bid per new customer and let the KiX algorithm match qualified users to your brand.
how.step3.title: [he-IL] Pay per delivered customer
how.step3.body: [he-IL] Only verified new customers are billable. No minimums, no long-term contracts.
industries.title: [he-IL] 34 verticals supported
industries.sub: [he-IL] From F&B to real estate — purpose-built playbooks per category.
pricing.title: [he-IL] Transparent pricing. No subscription, no setup fee.
pricing.sub: [he-IL] Free SaaS. Pay only for results.
pricing.free.label: [he-IL] Free forever
pricing.free.desc: [he-IL] All gamification capabilities, at no cost.
pricing.free.item3: [he-IL] SDKs for Web, iOS and Android
pricing.free.item4: [he-IL] No brand limits, no user caps
pricing.paid.label: [he-IL] Pay for acquisition
pricing.paid.cpa.name: [he-IL] CPA
pricing.paid.cpa.label: [he-IL] per new customer
pricing.paid.cps.name: [he-IL] CPS
pricing.paid.cps.label: [he-IL] share of new-customer revenue
pricing.paid.cpm.name: [he-IL] CPM
pricing.paid.cpm.label: [he-IL] per thousand impressions
pricing.paid.cpv.name: [he-IL] CPV
pricing.paid.cpv.label: [he-IL] per store visit
pricing.paid.cpe.name: [he-IL] CPE
pricing.paid.cpe.label: [he-IL] per engagement
proof.title: [he-IL] Early customers are growing with KiX
proof.q1.text: [he-IL] Across ten stores, our KiX bids won 91% of auctions and delivered 41 new customers in the first sprint.
proof.q1.author: [he-IL] Nanyang Tea
proof.q2.text: [he-IL] KiX reminders lifted our treatment repeat rate to 36% — about 2.4x our previous SMS programme.
proof.q2.author: [he-IL] Bare Beauty
proof.q3.text: [he-IL] A 7-month attribution window surfaced honeymoon bookings that standard ad platforms never see.
proof.q3.author: [he-IL] Worldwide Travel
users.title: [he-IL] Download the KiX app — play games, earn rewards
users.sub: [he-IL] Play at any KiX partner merchant, earn rewards and discover new brands.
users.card.title: [he-IL] Play to earn
users.card.body: [he-IL] Scan a QR code at a participating merchant. Win real rewards — discounts, free items and exclusive experiences.
